name: resultsAmplifier
description: Agent 28 — Results Amplifier. Runs monthly (1st of month) + on milestone webhooks. Detects Page 1 / Top 3 / 90-Day Win ranking milestones, fires review-capture SMS, scores incoming testimonials across 5 dimensions, routes high-score ones to content-team as case-study candidates, posts celebrations to #c-suite-command-center, DMs Chuck on 90-day wins, chain-invokes Agent 22 for milestone videos.
